allow: PowerShell($excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; $excel.Visible = $false; $excel.DisplayAlerts = $false; $wb = $excel.Workbooks.Open\('C:\\Users\\admin\\Downloads\\wpt-dashboard\\WastePowertech_OMS_1.xlsx'\); Write-Host 'Sheets:'; for \($i = 1; $i -le $wb.Sheets.Count; $i++\) { Write-Host $wb.Sheets.Item\($i\).Name }; $wb.Close\($false\); $excel.Quit\(\))

PowerShell($excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; $excel.Visible = $false; $excel.DisplayAlerts = $false; $wb = $excel.Workbooks.Open\('C:\\Users\\admin\\Downloads\\wpt-dashboard\\WastePowertech_OMS_1.xlsx'\); $ws = $wb.Sheets.Item\('GHID WHITEBOARD'\); $used = $ws.UsedRange; $rows = $used.Rows.Count; $cols = $used.Columns.Count; Write-Host "Rows: $rows, Cols: $cols"; for \($r = 1; $r -le [Math]::Min\($rows, 60\); $r++\) { $line = ''; for \($c = 1; $c -le $cols; $c++\) { $v = $ws.Cells.Item\($r,$c\).Text; if \($v\) { $line += "[$c]$v | " } }; if \($line\) { Write-Host "R${r}: $line" } }; $wb.Close\($false\); $excel.Quit\(\))
